purpose: Deterministic multi-skill workflow fixtures that check process-passport preservation across downstream research artifacts. These fixtures do not run a model or verify source truth.

process_passport.source_basis: Synthetic upstream source_discovery_log with process passport; no full-text verification.
process_passport.source_access_level: citation only; abstract only; no full text access
process_passport.corpus_coverage: Partial workflow fixture corpus; representativeness and counter-literature are not verified.
tool_use: No external lookup; deterministic local workflow-passport fixture only.
unresolved_risks: Search log is planned and citation-only; no full-text source-claim fit or locator check has been performed.
handoff_limits: Do not extract this as verified evidence or completed search results.

workflow_claims.claim: Candidate source may support a chapter claim, but support has not been verified.

process_passport.source_basis: Consumed upstream source_discovery_log process passport and generated provisional extraction_table; no verification step performed.
process_passport.source_access_level: citation only; abstract only; no full text access
process_passport.corpus_coverage: Partial workflow fixture corpus; representativeness and counter-literature are not verified.
tool_use: No external lookup; deterministic local workflow-passport fixture only.
unresolved_risks: Search log is planned and citation-only; no full-text source-claim fit or locator check has been performed.
Downstream artifact must preserve upstream uncertainty until a visible verification step resolves it.
handoff_limits: Do not extract this as verified evidence or completed search results.
Do not upgrade evidence, locator, or human-verification status from this handoff alone.
process_passport.intended_next_skill_or_use: next workflow gate or human reviewer

workflow_claims.claim: Candidate source may support a chapter claim, but support has not been verified.

forbidden_behavior: Removing unresolved risks without a verification note.
Treating citation-only or abstract-only access as full-text verification.
Dropping human-review requirements.
Silently upgrading unverified claims, missing locators, or partial corpus limits to verified status.
